---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem in expert-review-panel behavior, packaging, or outputs
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What went wrong?
Describe the failure clearly.

## Input / scenario
Was this a paper, BP, code review, competition deck, or creative work review?

## What did you expect?
Describe the expected behavior or output.

## What happened instead?
Paste a short example, error, or output excerpt.

## Why this matters
Explain whether this affects rigor, usability, packaging, or evaluation quality.
